name: SCC_MeteringReceiptRes
title: SCC_MeteringReceiptRes
syntax: void SCC_MeteringReceiptRes ( byte SessionID[], long ResponseCode )
description: The callback is called as soon as a Metering Receipt Response is received. . Further details that are transmitted in this message can be queried with

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 – 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF.
